data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Sites 1 (pipeline FEASIBILITY_GAP), 2 (preplanning REPLAN_ESCALATE + feasibility_cycle_count), 4 (.test-index RED marker removal) all applied successfully. Site 3 (dso-config.conf brainstorm.max_feasibility_cycles=2) write is confirmed correct via Python-level verification but is being reverted by a sandbox hook that intercepts bash process reads of .claude/ files. The edit needs to be applied by the orchestrator.
